habitat: Dry forests of southern India; related Australian sandalwoods commercial too.
traditionalUsesEn: Sacred fragrance and traditional Ayurvedic cooling aromatic; perfume industry.
traditionalUsesDe: Heiliger Duft und ayurvedisches kühlendes Aroma; Parfümindustrie.
preparation: Essential oil diluted topical/aromatic; wood for incense.
cautions: Endangered/regulated wild harvest—prefer sustainable/plantation sources. Oil dilute only.
historicalNotes: Overharvest led to strict protection in India; plantation revival ongoing.
habitatDe: Dry Wälder von southern Indien; related Australienn sandalWälder commercial too.
preparationDe: Ätherisches Öl verdünnt äußerlich/aromatic; Holz für incense.
cautionsDe: Endangered/regulated wild harvest—prefer sustainable/plantation sources. Öl verdünnen only.
historicalNotesDe: Overharvest led zu strict protection in Indien; plantation revival ongoing.
